title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Backend Developer in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
